blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,663 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
